channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Warsh pledges to address inflation in first testimony as Fed chairman
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh told the House Financial Services Committee that the central bank has "no tolerance for persistently elevated inf...

item.title: Dr. Erica Schwartz questioned on vaccines during CDC director confirmation hearing
item.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz testified before a Senate committee on Wednesday for her confirmation as CDC director.

item.title: Iran live updates: US launches second round of strikes on Iran on Wednesday
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Why is Zelenskyy restructuring his cabinet amid successes against Russia?
item.description: Ukraine's president is reorganizing his government as analysts note positive shifts in the war's trajectory with Russia.
